data.name: Controls how long models stay in memory after a request. Ollama format (e.g., '5m', '1h', '24h'). Use '0' to unload immediately, or '-1' to keep forever.
data.value: Controls how long models stay in memory after a request. Ollama format (e.g., '5m', '1h', '24h'). Use '0' to unload immediately, or '-1' to keep forever.

data.name: Controls how long the AI model weights stay loaded in GPU VRAM after a request. Ollama format (e.g., '5m', '1h', '24h'). Use '0' to unload immediately, or '-1' to keep in VRAM forever.
data.value: Controls how long the AI model weights remain loaded in GPU VRAM after a request. Ollama format (e.g., '5m', '1h', '24h'). Use '0' to unload immediately, or '-1' to keep in VRAM indefinitely.

data.name: Do NOT use raw seconds like '300'. Write '5m' instead. Invalid formats are silently ignored by Ollama.
data.value: Do NOT use raw seconds like '300'. Write '5m' instead. Invalid formats are silently ignored by Ollama.

data.name: How long model weights stay in GPU VRAM after the last request. Uses Ollama duration format: (number)(unit) — e.g.
data.value: How long model weights remain in GPU VRAM after the last request. Uses Ollama duration format: (number)(unit) — e.g.

data.name: How long the background health monitor waits when probing this provider for model lists and running status. Set higher for providers with slow storage (HDD/NAS).
data.value: How long the background health monitor waits when probing this provider for model lists and running status. Set higher for providers with slow storage (HDD/NAS).

data.name: Maximum number of concurrent requests sent to this provider. 0 = unlimited (default). Set to 1 to serialize requests and prevent the backend from being overwhelmed.
data.value: Maximum number of concurrent requests sent to this provider. 0 = unlimited (default). Set to 1 to serialize requests and prevent the backend from being overwhelmed.

data.name: No physical models found on this server.
data.value: No physical models found on this server.

data.name: Select physical models that should be proactively kept loaded in this provider's VRAM. The gateway will periodically ping these models to prevent them from being unloaded.
data.value: Select physical models that should be proactively kept loaded in this provider's VRAM. The gateway will periodically ping these models to prevent them from being unloaded.

data.name: Waiting in the concurrency queue does NOT consume the virtual model's Request Timeout. A request will wait indefinitely for a slot — only a client disconnection (browser close, SDK timeout) stops the wait. The virtual model does not give up on a backend just because it is busy.
data.value: Waiting in the concurrency queue does NOT consume the virtual model's Request Timeout. A request will wait indefinitely for a slot — only a client disconnection (browser close, SDK timeout) stops the wait. The virtual model does not give up on a backend just because it is busy.

data.name: Warmup is not applicable to OpenAI-compatible providers. The upstream service manages model loading automatically.
data.value: Warmup is not applicable to OpenAI-compatible providers. The upstream service manages model loading automatically.
